title: Add score reconciliation with history (Golden Test 8)
problem: Relationships have initial confidence values but no score_events history. Golden Test 8 requires that new supporting evidence can adjust relationship confidence with an append-only audit trail.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 8: score reconciliation updates relationship confidence with history.
acceptance_criteria: New supporting evidence for an existing relationship increases confidence and writes a score_events row.
score_events preserve old_score, new_score, triggering_claim_id, and machine-readable reason.
non_goals: Do not implement contradiction detection (Golden Test 7).
Do not implement public export or LangGraph orchestration.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket branch; delete score_events rows created during manual testing from local SQLite.
